nasb.text: Now it came about when the king lived in his house, and the Lord had given him rest on every side from all his enemies,

esv.text: Now when the king lived in his house and the Lord  had given him rest from all his surrounding enemies,

cnv.text: 那時，王住在自己的宮中，耶和華使他安享太平，不受周圍仇敵的侵擾。

ccb.text: 大卫住在王宫里，耶和华使他安享太平，不受四围的仇敌侵扰。
